pfsense-enhanced-http.description: pfSense Enhanced MCP Server via SSE (Server-Sent Events)

notes.setup: Start the server with HTTP transport by setting MCP_MODE=http in your .env file or environment
notes.remote_access: For remote pfSense instances, update the URL to your server's public IP or domain
notes.security: For production use, enable HTTPS with a reverse proxy (nginx, caddy, traefik)
notes.compatibility: Works with both Claude Code CLI and Claude web interface
